channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Historical Analysis of the Oslo Accords and Their Impact on Palestine
item.description: The article analyzes the longstanding impact of so-called 'peace agreements' on the Palestinian struggle, particularly focusing on the Oslo Accords signed in 1993. It argues that these agreements have...

item.title: DHS Plans $38.3bn Expansion of ICE Detention Network Through Warehouse Conversions
item.description: US Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) is preparing a sweeping expansion of immigration detention capacity, with plans to spend an estimated $38.3bn acquiring and converting warehouses across...

item.title: The LHS 1903 System Offers New Clues About the Origin of the Mini-Neptune Radius Gap
item.description: The planetary system around the red dwarf star LHS 1903, located 116 light-years away in the constellation Lynx, is providing astronomers with an exceptional opportunity to better understand the so-ca...

item.title: Tech Companies Responded to DHS Administrative Subpoenas Targeting Critics of ICE, Report Says
item.description: According to a report cited by The New York Times and covered by Gizmodo, Reddit, Meta, and Google voluntarily complied with at least some requests from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) ...

item.title: Cuba’s Economic Dependency and Political History from Batista to Today
item.description: Cuba's modern history has been shaped by a succession of powerful patrons and structural economic dependencies. During the Batista era, the island was dominated by a triad of power: Batista, the Ameri...

item.title: World of Hyatt Offers 20% Discount on Points Purchases Through April 7, 2026
item.description: World of Hyatt has launched a limited-time promotion offering a 20% discount on purchased points, reducing the cost to 2.08 cents per point. The offer is valid for transactions made between February 1...

item.title: Ukraine’s Former Energy Minister Detained Over Alleged $100M Corruption Scheme
item.description: Ukraine’s National Anti-Corruption Bureau (NABU) has detained former Energy Minister German Galushchenko while he was attempting to leave the country. Galushchenko resigned in November 2025 amid a maj...

item.title: Targeted Capital One Offer Provides 5,000 Bonus Miles for $200+ CardCash Gift Card Purchases

item.title: Bank of America to Reduce Preferred Rewards Bonuses and Adjust Eligibility Tiers
item.description: Bank of America has announced upcoming changes to its Preferred Rewards program, rebranding it as 'BofA Rewards' starting in May 2026. The program will see a reduction in status tiers from four to thr...

item.description: This article explores the key differences and similarities between two premium hotel programs: Fine Hotels + Resorts®, offered by American Express, and The Edit by Chase Travel℠, offered by Chase. Bot...

item.title: Marbella as a Hub for Espionage, Arms Trade, and Elite Excess in the 1970s-80s
item.description: The article explores how Marbella, a town on Spain’s Costa del Sol, became a center for international espionage, arms trading, and elite luxury during the late Francoist and early post-Francoist perio...

item.title: How to Choose Small Standing Desks for Efficient Home Workspaces

item.title: Kristin Cavallari Reflects on Personal Growth After Divorce from Jay Cutler
